title: In-App Notification for Account Sharing Invitations
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want to see an in-app notification when another user invites me to share their account, so that I am aware of pending invitations and can accept them upon login.
description: Add an in-app notification system that alerts users when they have been invited to share another user's account. When a user logs in, they should see a notification indicating that an invitation is pending, prompting them to accept or decline the data sharing invitation.
acceptance_criteria: User receives an in-app notification when invited to share another user's account
Notification is visible upon login if an invitation is pending
Notification indicates which user sent the invitation
User can act on the invitation from the notification
ux_changes: New notification indicator visible after login showing pending account sharing invitations.
middleware_changes: Logic to check for pending invitations on login and generate notification records for the invited user.
implementation_notes: Notifications are triggered when an account sharing invitation is sent. The notification appears on the invited user's next login.
comment_summary: Developer confirmed notifications are working when invitations are sent.
